description: Cross-validation rules and lifecycle data for STAVAGENT calculator/classifier sanity checks. Data here is consumed by validation_rules in calculator engines and by lifecycle cost analysis (TCO) — NOT for initial CapEx kalkulaci.

files.title: Návrhová životnost prvků mostu (per element type)

notes: New bucket created 2026-05-05 alongside B9_Equipment_Specs. Reason: lifecycle/durability data has different semantics than equipment specs (validation rules vs catalog lookup). See docs/KNOWLEDGE_PLACEMENT_GUIDE.md section 15 for canonical examples.
